data.title: Pre-existing child-parent self-dependency: c97f-2a16 depends on parent 7dfe-a1e9 in plugin boundary epic
data.description: validate-issues.sh --quick reports CRITICAL: c97f-2a16 (child of 7dfe-a1e9) has a depends_on link to its own parent 7dfe-a1e9 (child of 9b59-bac7). This is a cross-epic child dependency that should be expressed at the epic level instead. Pre-existing issue unrelated to epic 91f5-0aec.
